changes.description: Premium Mobile Modal UX with centered layouts and edge-to-edge headers
Viewport-pinned FAB (Floating Action Button) for Todo and Shopping list management
Smart Auto-Scroll and Instant-Focus logic for high-speed item entry
Dedicated Grocery Sorting system based on Swedish store aisle heuristics
Teleported success notifications to ensure visibility across all scroll depths
Full Application-wide localization (English & Swedish) across all core modules
Complete Swedish translation sweep for Shopping, Todo, and Kids systems
Resolved all hardcoded English strings in UI and confirm dialogs
Capitalized Swedish month names in History and Dashboard views
Expanded sv.json with missing keys identified during thorough UI audit
Admin Impersonation system with quick-revert sidebar banner
Stabilized Kids module by consolidating Alpine.js teleported modals
Optimized Economy summary grid to prevent horizontal stacking issues
New 'header-stats' utility for compact, responsive page summaries
Added overflow scroll support to all modals to prevent height issues on smaller screens
Refined Home Dashboard with responsive mobile layouts and fluid spacing
Consolidated database migrations into clean 'create' files for better maintainability
Added dynamic environment-aware snapshot scheduling for Docker deployments
Moved application history to static JSON for persistent release notes without database dependencies
Integrated Economy Module with Income and Savings tracking
Improved Todo List with due date categories and status filtering
Added Administrative UI for module activation and system settings
Initial Release of Homeplanner core system
Support for Google Authentication and Multi-user households
Basic Shopping List and Todo management modules
